content.speakerText: If it doesn’t get better in 2 days, see a doctor.
content.speakerTextCn: 两天还没好，就去看医生。

options.text: I’ll go to the hospital right away.
I don’t need to see a doctor.
Can you give me a stronger medicine?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Will do. Thanks so much!' 是对医生提醒的礼貌且配合的回应，符合场景语境。选项1虽然合理但过于急切，不符合原句的‘两天后若未好转’的建议；选项3是拒绝提醒，不礼貌；选项4是要求换药，偏离了提醒的回应重点。

content.speakerText: No alcohol with this med, okay?

options.text: I’ll have a beer after I take it.
Is it okay to drink water?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Got it — no drinks.' 直接确认了禁忌，简洁且体现安全意识。选项1是违反医嘱；选项3转移话题，无关回应；选项4问的是水，而提醒是关于酒精，属于误解重点。

content.speakerText: Take this medicine after meals to avoid stomach upset.
content.speakerTextCn: 饭后服用此药，以免引起胃部不适。

options.text: I’ll take it on an empty stomach.
Understood. I’ll take it after eating.
Can I skip meals to take it faster?
Does it work better at night?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Understood. I’ll take it after eating.' 准确回应了服药时间提醒，体现配合。选项1是反向操作，有健康风险；选项3是荒谬提问；选项4偏离了服药时间的核心提醒。

content.template: If you still feel unwell in two days, ______ a doctor.
content.hint: 这是药剂师给出的常见医疗建议句型
这是常见的药物禁忌提醒词

content.template: Please ______ this medicine with food to reduce side effects.
content.hint: 药剂师常提醒的服药方式
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（take medicine with food）

content.speakerText: If it doesn’t get better in 2 days, see a doctor.
content.speakerTextCn: 两天还没好，就去看医生。
expectedAnswers: Okay, I’ll keep an eye on it and call if it gets worse.
Got it — I’ll make an appointment if I’m not better by then.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应了‘两天后若未好转就看医生’的建议
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用口语化表达，符合日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了‘see a doctor’或‘better’等关键词

content.speakerText: No alcohol with this med, okay?
expectedAnswers: I don’t drink, so that’s fine.
I’ll avoid alcohol completely while taking this.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认不饮酒，体现安全意识
语言准确性：用词正确，无语法错误
表达自然度：使用自然口语表达，非机械背诵
关键词覆盖：使用了‘alcohol’或‘no drinks’等关键词

content.speakerText: Store this medicine in a cool, dry place away from children.
content.speakerTextCn: 请将此药存放在阴凉干燥处，远离儿童。
expectedAnswers: Okay, I’ll keep it in the cabinet.
Got it — I’ll put it up high and out of reach.
Thanks for reminding me — I’ll lock it away.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应了存放要求，体现安全意识
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用正确
表达自然度：表达自然，符合真实语境
关键词覆盖：使用了‘store’, ‘cool, dry place’, ‘away from children’等关键词
